81733659.title: 2025–26 FIS Freestyle Ski World Cup
81733659.extract:
The 2025–26 FIS Freestyle Ski World Cup, organized by the International Ski Federation (FIS), is a World Cup in freestyle skiing for men and women.
The season started on 20 November 2025 in Stubai, Austria and will conclude on 29 March 2026 in Idre Fjäll, Sweden.
This season included six disciplines: moguls, aerials, ski cross, halfpipe, slopestyle and big air.

categories.title: Category:Articles lacking reliable references from December 2025
